title: Sempoove Poove Lyrics Siraichalai
stanzas:
Andhi sooriyanum
kundril saaya
megam vandhu
kachchaiyaaga
kaaman thangum
moga poovil
muththak kummaalam

thanga thingal
nettri pottum ittu
vennilaavin kannam thottu
ninjilaadum swasa soottil
kadhal kuttraalam

thaen thelikkum
thendralaai ninnarugil
vandhu naan
seelai nadhi oramaai
neendhi vilayaadavaa

indha thamarai
poo theeyil indru
kaathirukku ullam nondhu
kangal ennum poondhaen
thumbi paadi sellaadho.

andha kaamanambu
ennai suttu
paavai nenjin
naanam suttu
megalaiyin noolarukkum
selai pon poove.

vimmiyadhu thamarai
vandu thodum naalilaam
paavai mayil saayudhe
mannavanin maarbilo

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sempoove Poove, the lyrics express a deep yearning and romantic affection, beautifully portrayed through the voices of K.S. Chitra and SPB. The song plays a significant role in Siraichalai, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. It conveys the feelings of love and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, evokes nostalgia and warmth, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sempoove Poove from Siraichalai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.S. Chitra and SPB, paired with Ilaiyaraaja's magical composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced romance. Dive into this lyrical masterpiece that transcends time and evokes heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: If I come to your sky, will there be a path?
Even if the raindrops fall, they will turn into pearls...
With an army, will the heart of love walk?
Will the king's fingers be like a child's?
Will the signs and symbols become the way to freedom?
If I come to your sky, will there be a path?
Even if the raindrops fall, they will turn into pearls...
The evening sun and the cloud will come together, and in the flower garden, love will bloom like a pearl.
The golden moon will touch the silver moon, and in the breath of love, it will play with the eyes.
Like honey dripping from the sky, if you come, I will flow like a river and play.
Every day, the lightning will say a little flower's name.
Desires will dance in the heart like fish in water.
In the darkness, will the feet dance or will the hands be tied?
If you are a flower,
This lotus flower is waiting in the fire, my heart is longing, will the bees sing?
That love will wrap around me like a beautiful flower.
The lotus will touch the sky, and the peacock will fly in the king's garden.
Oh pearl, I will weave a thread for you, my eyes.
I will take the path of love,
The secret of the heart is not to be spoken...
Even if the raindrops fall, they will turn into pearls...
If I come to your sky, will there be a path?
Will the king's fingers be like a child's?
With an army, will the heart of love walk?
Will the signs and symbols become the way to freedom?
If you are a flower...
